General Manager JteUens, Of the Great
Northern, Says That the Coming
immigration WiX be Double


That of Last Year:

pages.raw_text:
John F. Stevens. general manager
of the Great Northern railroad, &C.
companied by Assistant General Su-
perintendent H. A. Kennedy. arrived
in Spokane at 8 o'clock yesterday
afternoon on special train.


Eve are on a tour Of inspection"
said Mr.. Stevens to The Press, land
we are making it a thorough one.
We want everything to be in first
class condition when the westbound
tourists begin coming about the mid
die Of February.


1.-THE low immigration rate from
the east begins February is and
from all 1 can learn the number of
people who will take advantage Of 1t
will be fully double that of last
